title: BreezyHR Jobs Scraper
description: Discover and scrape jobs from all BreezyHR-powered company job boards. Finds companies automatically via Common Crawl indexes, then scrapes their public job listings.

mode.title: Mode
mode.description:
How to find companies to scrape.
- **all**: Auto-discover companies from Common Crawl + scrape all of them
- **companies**: Scrape only the specified company slugs
- **search**: Scrape specified companies and apply filters

companies.title: Company Slugs
companies.description: Company slugs to scrape (used in 'companies' and 'search' modes). The slug is the company identifier in the BreezyHR URL, e.g. 'acme' from acme.breezy.hr

remoteOnly.title: Remote Only
remoteOnly.description: Only include jobs marked as remote
remoteOnly.sectionDescription: Optional filters to narrow down results. Applied after scraping.

locationFilter.title: Location Filter
locationFilter.description: Regex pattern to filter jobs by location (e.g. 'Berlin|Prague|Remote')

departmentFilter.title: Department Filter
departmentFilter.description: Regex pattern to filter jobs by department (e.g. 'Engineering|Product')

keywordFilter.title: Keyword Filter
keywordFilter.description: Regex pattern to filter jobs by title (e.g. 'Senior|Lead|Staff')

salaryFilter.title: Salary Filter
salaryFilter.description: Regex pattern to filter jobs by salary information (e.g. '\$[1-9]\d{2},?\d{3}')

concurrency.title: Concurrency
concurrency.description: Number of companies to scrape in parallel

maxCompanies.title: Max Companies
maxCompanies.description: Limit the number of companies to scrape (0 = no limit, useful for testing)
